metadata.title: Rental Management | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Adon Rental is now inventory, ecommerce, sales, accounting, and signatures in one app. Get organized, reduce manual work, and make every rental process faster.

hero.subtitle: Rental management software for modern businesses
hero.title: Rent it.
hero.description: Adon Rental is now inventory, ecommerce, sales, accounting, and signatures in one app. Get organized, reduce manual work, and make every rental process faster.

onlineRentalSection.title: Save time,
onlineRentalSection.description: Publish products, let customers select dates, validate availability, and confirm rental requests directly through your website.

timeMoneySection.title: Time is money...
timeMoneySection.subtitle: literally
timeMoneySection.description: Automate quotations, invoices, confirmations, and follow-ups so your team spends less time on repetitive tasks and more time serving customers.

signatureSection.title: Signature requests
signatureSection.subtitle: on request
signatureSection.description: Upload rental agreements, insurance forms, contracts, and waiver documents. Request customer signatures digitally before every rental starts.

todoSection.title: Automate your
todoSection.description: From pickup to return, Adon can automatically create tasks for your team so nothing gets missed.

unavailableDays.title: Unavailable days
unavailableDays.description: Select days when specific products, rooms, vehicles, or equipment are not available.

minimalRentalTime.title: Minimal rental time
minimalRentalTime.description: Set a minimum rental duration so your products are booked only within valid time slots.

paddingInOut.title: Padding in & out
paddingInOut.description: Add preparation time before and after each rental to keep your workflow smooth.

delayCosts.title: Delay costs
delayCosts.description: Apply automatic extra charges when rented products are returned late.

defaultPaddingTime.title: Default padding time
defaultPaddingTime.description: Schedule buffer time between bookings to prepare, clean, or inspect products.

easyQuotations.title: Easy quotations
easyQuotations.description: Create and send professional quotations directly from the rental request.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with integrated apps that work together.

ctaSection.title: Join 15 million users
ctaSection.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: After renting hundreds of products, Adon helped us manage every contract, invoice, signature, and delivery from one simple platform. The best part is that our team finally knows what to do next.
testimonial.name: Marc Robinson
testimonial.title: Rental manager
